prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京理工大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约2226名、2270名、2106名、1883名、1842名，整体呈持续上升趋势（位次数字减小），近3年从2106名提升至1842名，累计前移约264名，表明该校在山东考生中的吸引力逐年增强；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年为144人，2022–2025年均为138人，2026年（据招生计划文件）回升至144人，较2025年扩招6人（增幅约4.35%），扩招在一定程度上缓解了竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名从2021年第19名持续攀升至2025年第13名、2026年第14名，稳居全国顶尖理工类高校前列，对高分考生具有较强吸引力；2026年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风相关舆情事件（宫琳事件等），但学校舆情应对较为迅速；抖音热度排名第47位（较热），短视频平台曝光度处于中上水平，整体报考关注度未出现明显降温信号；第五轮学科评估中，信息与通信工程、控制科学与工程获评A+，计算机科学与技术、机械工程、材料科学与工程、光学工程、管理科学与工程获评A，力学、数学、物理学、化学工程与技术、工商管理获评A-，共12个A-及以上学科，工科实力极为突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中持续被评为高热推荐或推荐，与北理工优势工科方向高度契合；山东省2026年普通高考考生总数约72万人，较2025年增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧了优质高校的竞争；省控线（普通类一段）近年稳定在441–444分之间，无明显波动；北京理工大学位于北京市，属一线城市高校，对山东考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在山东省招生计划占比较为稳定，2026年计划144人，属在京985高校中在鲁招生规模较大的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年扩招6人（+4.35%）与山东省考生总数增加约3.9万人（+5.7%）的供需关系、学校排名持续攀升、优势学科强劲且对应专业社会热度高，以及声誉舆情偏负面但影响有限等因素，判断2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧。预测最低录取位次约1850名，区间1639–2061名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（卓越班）
- 工科试验班（未来精工技术）
- 工科试验班（徐特立英才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（信息科学技术）
- 工科试验班（电子信息实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（航空航天与机电类）
- 理科试验班（理学与材料菁英班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1850名，区间1639–2061名。位次在区间上限（2061名）附近建议以二档信息科学技术或电子信息实验班为主攻方向，冲刺一档徐特立英才班或卓越班；位次明显优于区间下限（1639名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（卓越班/未来精工技术）；三档专业可作为保底选择。北理工工科实力突出，建议优先选择与A+/A学科对应的专业方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing Institute of Technology in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 2226, 2270, 2106, 1883, and 1842, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In the past three years, the ranking improved from 2106 to 1842, moving up by about 264 places, indicating increasing attractiveness to Shandong candidates. The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Shandong was 144 in 2021, 138 from 2022 to 2025, and is expected to return to 144 in 2026 (according to enrollment plan documents), an increase of 6 students (approximately 4.35%) compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's main list rose from 19th in 2021 to 13th in 2025 and 14th in 2026, consistently among the top national science and engineering universities, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to teacher ethics-related public opinion events (such as the Gong Lin incident), but the university responded relatively quickly. Its Douyin popularity ranks 47th (relatively hot), with short video platform exposure at an upper-middle level, and overall application attention shows no clear signs of cooling. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering, and Control Science and Engineering received A+, Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering received A, and Mechanics, Mathematics, Physics, Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Business Administration received A-, totaling 12 disciplines at A- or above, with exceptionally strong engineering strength highly matched to its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently rated as high-heat or recommended in 2024–2026 major popularity analyses, highly aligned with BIT's advantageous engineering fields. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Shandong Province in 2026 is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (5.7%) from 2025, intensifying competition for high-quality universities. The provincial control line (regular first batch) has been stable between 441–444 points in recent years, with no significant fluctuations. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, strongly attractive to Shandong candidates. Its enrollment plan in Shandong is relatively stable, with 144 planned for 2026, making it one of the larger-scale enrolling 985 universities in Beijing in Shandong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment increase of 6 students (+4.35%) versus the increase in Shandong candidates of about 39,000 (+5.7%), the university's rising ranking, strong advantageous disciplines with high social popularity for corresponding majors, and the slightly negative reputation but limited impact, it is judged that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 1850, with a range of 1639–2061.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Precision Engineering Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xu Teli Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Information Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Mechanical and Electrical)
- Science Experimental Class (Science and Materials Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 1850, range 1639–2061. Candidates near the upper limit of the range (2061) are advised to focus on Tier 2 Information Science and Technology or Electronic Information Experimental Class as the main direction, and aim for Tier 1 Xu Teli Talent Class or Excellence Class. Candidates significantly better than the lower limit (within 1639) can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors (Excellence Class/Future Precision Engineering Technology). Tier 3 majors can serve as safety choices. BIT's engineering strength is outstanding, so it is recommended to prioritize major directions corresponding to A+/A disciplines.
